title: Treat structural identity or edition text as the canonical computed fact

positions.summary: Compute line states, trigrams, and King Wen identifiers while returning edition-aware locators without embedded text.
Treat the wording of a selected edition or commentary as an additional, separately attributed interpretive layer.

default_policy.rationale: A deterministic chart must not change when a translation or commentary edition changes.

user_disclosure: The computed result contains structural identifiers and source locators; any quoted or paraphrased edition text must be attributed separately.

sources.locator: three-coin and King Wen mapping contract
